metrics.textPreview: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center S Skyler Admin Workspace › datapact.atlas ⌘K UC connected · 74.4% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. GLOSSARY & CDE REGISTRY Shared business meaning, anchored to data Glossary terms link to source-of-record assets. Critical Data Elements have stricter ownership, certification, and lineage requirements. + New term Glossary 20 CDE Registry 17 Showing 4 of 20 governed glossary terms HIERARCHY 4 visible terms ga-taxonomy-node-revenue Average Revenue No child terms recorded ga-taxonomy-node-revenue Billable Amount No child terms recorded ga-taxonomy-node-revenue Contracted Revenue No child terms recorded ga-taxonomy-node-customer Customer Identifier No child terms recorded Average Revenue Finance · sarah.johnson@entrada.ai Proposed Average revenue measure used for segment, market, and portfolio analysis. SOURCE live ASSOCIATIONS 1 linked asset - actor visibility not verified REVIEW Reviewed May 3, 2026 1 assets Preview lineage -> Billable Amount Finance · sarah.johnson@entrada.ai Approved Amount eligible for invoicing after service, product, or transaction rules are applied. SOURCE live ASSOCIATIONS 1 linked asset - actor visibility not verified REVIEW Reviewed May 3, 2026 1 assets Preview lineage -> Contracted Revenue Finance · sarah.johnson@entrada.ai Approved Revenue governed by signed customer agreements and committed service terms. SOURCE

Quality test-run or recertification workflow proof appears only when backed evidence is returned. helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center S Skyler Admin Workspace › datapact.atlas ⌘K UC connected · 74.4% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who se

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center S Skyler Admin Workspace › datapact.atlas ⌘K UC connected · 74.4% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who se
